skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.ancient_spear_: When the user performs an attack, the weapon consumes durability to summon small sandstorms that surge forward in the direction the user is facing.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.astrape.toolti:
The essence of the storm lies within this weapon, yearning to be unleashed—free as its master once was...

Channels stored lightning energy into the left hand. Depending on how long the energy is charged before being released to the heavens, the ability changes: a low charge unleashes Neféli, while a high charge triggers Katáigis.

Neféli:
Summons a thundercloud above the wielder. While present, the cloud launches lightning spears toward targeted entities upon impact.

The cloud does NOT vanish if the wielder switches weapon categories; it persists over time. Spears are triggered by impacts, not necessarily from the weapon that activated this Innate Skill.

It is only lost if the caster died, or the wielder leaves the dimension and it becomes unloaded.

Katáigis:
Launches an electric helix into the sky. Upon reaching a certain height, it explodes, leaving ionized sparks in the air and electrifying the environment. This generates sparks and arcs, and applies the 'Conductor' status to nearby entities.

All hostile entities can be affected by the lightning. Entities impacted by the lightning released from the explosion will receive a total of %s of damage.

Additionally, the area damage from these charges will be %s + %s when standing on electrical residue.

Subsequently, upon receiving the ionization impact, all targeted entities will receive %s + %s.

If the wielder targets a neutral or peaceful entity while casting, the lightning and status will target that entity's group as well as nearby hostile entities.

The 'Conductor' status increases all Electro damage received by 20%%. Entities with this status may be struck by lightning; when struck, they lose the status.

Sources of Electro damage include the weapon itself when using the 'Dýna' Internal Subskill, which imbues it with lightning.

Both the Electric Cloud and the Ionized environment are combinable, the caster can have the effects several times at the same time, however, each effect has its own identity, time, cooldowns, calculations, etc; This prevents skills from overwriting themselves.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.astrape_active: Allows switching between the weapon’s internal abilities by pressing %s + %s.

Skill effects can stack with one another; however, only one instance of an effect may be active per state.

Casting additional skills without switching weapons will not override the currently active skill. Instead, newly cast skills are placed into a queue.

Once the active skill ends, the next queued skill with the same type is automatically activated.

This behavior does not apply to Eikon, as it is an attack skill rather than an enchantment-type skill like the others.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.astrape_passiv: During rain or storms, if the wielder is sufficiently charged and falls from a great height, they can envelop themselves in electricity, negating fall damage and electrifying nearby enemies upon landing. This consumes 50%% of the weapon's charge.

The ability can only be activated after the user has fallen a total of 30 blocks in absolute distance. An absolute fall means that negative coordinates are treated as positive values (e.g., a fall from Y = -10 counts as 10 blocks). While this rule reduces the required distance to 20 blocks for other mechanics, it does not apply to this ability.

If, at any point during the fall, rain becomes unavailable, the ability is immediately canceled. Once the effect is triggered, the user becomes effectively immortal during the fall and for 1 second after landing.
Upon impact, the damage dealt by the weapon is stored as a positive electrical charge within its wielder. This charge increases depending on the environment and the target's condition.

The charge gain is 30% of the damage dealt. If you are underwater or swimming, you gain an additional 20% charge gain. Furthermore, being in the rain grants an additional 10% charge gain. These effects stack with each other.

After landing 3 successful hits on an enemy, the wielder generates a negative charge on the target. When this negative charge interacts with the wielder’s positive charge, a lightning bolt is triggered upon impact. If the enemy is underwater or in the rain, the lightning spreads but becomes weaker, dealing less damage.

Electrical charges are only deposited on the target if the attack is a basic attack; AirSlash, Dash Attack, or Innate Skills do not add negative charges, Although these attacks DON'T add charges to the target, they do allow the effect to be triggered.

The damage caused by overload is %s + %s.

If the target is in the rain or underwater, the effect spreads in an area, causing %s + %s to the target and %s + %s damage to surrounding entities.

The propagation radius of Overload is 5
The positive charge stored within the wielder is converted into an attack speed bonus, scaling from 0%% to 35%% as the charge reaches maximum.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.astrape_subact: Pressing %s consumes 15%% of the charge. The wielder channels lightning into their left hand, preparing to release a beam in the direction they are facing.
Once Eikon is cast, Astrape in %s Cooldown
Pressing %s consumes 60%% of the charge, enveloping the weapon in lightning and altering its damage type from physical damage to electrical damage.

The time of the effect is %s.

The damage modification is not merely on Astrape. It affects not only the weapon’s direct damage, but all damage dealt by the user while holding Astrape and while the weapon is imbued with Electric damage. All such damage is effectively converted into Electric damage, inheriting all associated properties.

This includes damage from the Overload Passive, Eikón, Dikerávnos, In general, all the damage caused by the user.

The effect cannot be recast while it is active, and its remaining duration is reduced only while Astrape is being held. When Astrape is not in hand, the effect enters a suspended state.

The imbuement applies exclusively while holding Astrape; releasing it temporarily removes the imbuement, which is automatically restored once Astrape is held again.
Pressing %s consumes 30%% of the charge, granting increased movement speed in +18%% while holding the weapon.

Upon casting and gaining the movement speed bonus for a total of %s seconds. The movement speed bonus cannot be recast while the ability is still active; the buff duration is only reduced while holding the weapon, going into standby mode if Astrape is no longer held.

No skills have been linked.

The eyes of eternity are watching you for rejecting the gifts of heaven...
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.shredder.toolt:
The faint metallic whir of the spinning saw stirs a thirst for slaughter, eager to stain its teeth once more...

On cast, it emits a subtle shockwave that gently repels nearby entities (excluding the primary target) and grants temporary crowd-control immunity.

Upon impact, the saw impales the target, holding them in place as it accelerates and closes in. Depending on the target’s weight, one of the following effects occurs:

Vertical Slash (Light Enemies): Lifts the target into the air, over-accelerates the saw, and deals continuous damage each tick of the animation. This damage ignores invulnerability frames.

If the target is slain, a portion of its innate ability’s energy and resources is restored.

Horizontal Slash (Heavy Enemies): Drives the saw deep into the target, dealing reduced damage. No energy or resource recovery occurs upon their death.

While impaled, the target remains under crowd control — vertical or horizontal cuts keep them bound to the saw.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.shredder_passi: On hit, the sawteeth burrow into the target, severely hindering their attack speed and weapon handling. Upon impact, it unleashes slashes that tear from within, dealing %s damage that bypasses invulnerability frames.

Attack speed while passing through an entity is randomly reduced and locked between 0.15 and 0.3.

During this time, weapon damage bypasses the target’s invulnerability frames.

I-Frame ignoring damage scales with base damage, with its ratio varying depending on the attack type.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.soul_render.to:
The clamor of the spirits contained within this weapon, faintly escaping the spirit seal, cries out to be freed. Will you be the one to free them? Unleash their power through the aspects of the soul...

Soul's Wrath: Unleash the wrath of the souls by casting this skill and crouching at the end of the cast. This will allow you to wield your weapon and slam it into the ground, instantly summoning an explosion of spectral spears. Upon impact, you will deal %s of damage.

Soul's Surge: Unleash the souls in a wave and move at high speed. You will achieve this by running at the end of the cast. This will allow you to generate a long-distance dash that will deal %s of damage to the impacted entities and leave a trail of spectral spears.

Soul's Fields: Unleash the contained souls in the form of a field of spectral spears. This field is massive, but its damage is only due to the spears generated.

Soul's Wrath and Soul's Surge can create Spectral Spears with the same probability as their normal attacks, while Soul's Fields cannot.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.soul_render_pa: Hel's Grasp
Soul Offering
Reduces armor from all sources by 25% and increases base attack damage by 10%.
Path of the Reborn

Increases attack speed by 5%. Additionally, upon resurrection and while traversing spiritual phases under the 'Path of the Wandering ' state, the attack speed bonus increases by an additional 5%.

It also grants one charge of the passive 'Soul Recursivity', setting its initial multiplier from x1 to x1.3. This provides a 30% multiplier to the attack speed bonus granted by 'Path of the Wandering '.

The attack speed multiplier from 'Path of the Reborn' applies to base attack speed, while the 30% bonus applies exclusively to the attack speed bonus from 'Path of the Wandering '. This bonus multiplies the conversion of its Spiritual Path and, in turn, is applied to its base attack speed.
Echoes of Resentment
Increases critical damage from all sources by 10%
The damage bonus is cumulative based on the number of rings you have
Path of the Wrathful

Limits the maximum probability of the passive 'Hel's Grasp' to 50%; any excess probability is converted into a damage bonus. Additionally, increases the branches of spectral spears created by the Sub Innate Skill 'Soul's Wrath' by 20%.

The damage conversion grants a 0.8% attack bonus for every 1% chance to rend the target's soul and summon spectral spears. Furthermore, while wearing the ring, the probability bonus from the Cursium armor follows a 1% to 1% conversion rate, maintaining full efficiency when converted into a damage bonus; the same logic applies to the probability bonus upon reaching 3 charges in 'Soul Recursivity'.
Phantom Roll
Press %s to roll backwards with an extra boost, allowing you to travel farther.

This action doesn’t consume stamina, has its own cooldown which is %s, and can be used even without learning the roll skill.

This ability can also cancel the current animation without needing to learn the 'Emergency Escape' skill. Furthermore, it can be cast in two ways: one while retaining the takeoff momentum to increase displacement, and another without retaining it upon cast in order to reset the current animation.
Weightless
Reduces fall damage.
Wraithfury
Press %s to sacrifice 3 hearts of health in exchange for a temporary 25.0%% damage boost for 20 seconds.

When casting, it enters %s and sacrificing, the user CANNOT die, regardless of the current amount of life, they will always be left with half a heart; the damage caused by the sacrifice cannot be reduced under any circumstances except by the user's current life.

The skill time is only reduced while holding Soul Render in your hand; while the weapon is not being held, the counter will NOT be reduced, allowing the bonus not to dissipate if you switch to any other item.
Spiritual Remnant

Once killed, the user will return to life with 5 hearts and will cycle through spiritual phases.

Path of the Imperishable: The user is intangible, but their attacks are also intangible. They will be unable to attack and will have bonus movement speed for 5 seconds.

Path of the Wandering : The user has an attack speed boost from 25% to 10%, this threshold is reduced over time. This path takes 6 minutes to complete, and the user cannot be revived during this period.

Path of the Perishable: The user can be brought back to life through this armor.

The spiritual phases continue to progress even if the user is not holding Soul Render or no longer has the armor equipped. These conditions only limit the effects themselves; the phase counter continues to decrease regardless.
Soul Recursion

Once the user dies and is resurrected by means of this Chestplate and is on the spiritual path 'Path of the Wandering ', all resurrections that the user makes through Totems of Undying will increase the attack speed bonus of 'Path of the Wandering '. The multiplier will increase up to a maximum of 3 times, being respectively x1.3, x1.6, x2.0. Reaching the maximum number of recursion bonuses grants a 5% extra chance of Hel's Grasp

The multiplier effect for the bonus offered by 'Path of the Wandering ' is not permanent while traversing it. Each recursion point lasts for a total of 2 minutes and is updated with each resurrection. After 2 minutes, it is reduced by only one point, meaning that not all charges are lost after that time. However, all charges are lost upon completion of the 'Path of the Wandering '.

Recursion points cannot be gained outside of this path, and resurrections via totems will not be taken into account.

The blade of this weapon is wreathed in fire and a spectral glow. When it strikes a living being, it has a chance to tear out a soul fragment and summon spectral spears from the ground to deal damage. The likelihood of summoning spears increases with the 'Sweeping Edge' enchantment.

The default probability is 25%%. This increases by a base amount thanks to 'Sweeping Edge'.

The increases are as follows: %s. If the spell breaks the enchantment limiter and achieves IV or IV+, the probability increases to %s.

 Additionally, each piece of Cursium Armor increases the probability by a total of 2.5%% per piece.
Spectral Gaze
Press %s to reveal all nearby living entities, marking them and causing them to glow.
When casting, it enters %s
Soul Reaper
Marked enemies take 8% extra damage.
The damage bonus applies to any marked entity, including those not marked by the user and the ability; it also applies to any being under the effect of Glow.
Ethereal Form
The user gains an ethereal form, allowing them to ignore attacks with a low probability, said probability increasing if the attack is a projectile.
The spectral power that surrounds your body due to the Cursium Armor has extended the attack 'Soul Field' to hit a larger area and branches.
skill.cataclysmic_arsenal.the_incinerato: Inner Flame

Harness the flames into your left hand and let your will shape their essence. As your control deepens, the fire shifts to a searing blue.

Crucible: Each enemy slain extends the duration of the Inner Flame state. However, this power comes at a cost: as time passes, the flame grows increasingly ravenous. Eventually, its hunger becomes insatiable, and further kills will no longer prolong the state.

Incandescent: While in this state, the user deals increased bonus damage based on the weapon's stored heat. However, each attack generates less heat than usual a trade-off for the heightened destructive power.

Champion: Activating Flame Champion-type abilities will change their fire type, increase their abilities, and reduce their cooldowns by 25%.
Champion of the Flames: Incinerate

If you have 100%% or more stored in your Heart of Embers, pressing %s and %s will intensely imbue your weapon with flames and slam it against the ground, causing an explosion that summons a circle of flames beneath you and smaller circles of flames around all nearby entities, burning them and then exploding. This ability resonates with your Inner Flame, so the effect will change depending on your status. When the effect ends, the weapon will remain imbued with the fire element for a time.

For each entity struck, the heat from your Heart of Embers will be drained by 10%%. The area of effect is 10 blocks away. Casting the Incinerator ability will have a %s.

If cast while in Inner Flame state, the damage range and color will change, and it will no longer explode.

Additionally, if it has consumed at least 60%% of its temperature or more (Hit 6 entities or more), the weapon will be imbued with fire-type damage for a total of %s
Ignis Conduit
Increases the maximum amount of heat by 10%
The effect is gained for each glove on each hand, therefore this effect is cumulative.
Ignis Infuser
On impact, you have a chance to infuse the target with the Blazing Brand status.
Ignis Catalyst

Modifies the behavior of the 'Glare' passive, allowing you to better exploit the radiance of each attack by more effectively catalyzing it in your hands. This modifies the damage bonus, increasing it for each catalyst you hold.

The damage bonus modification is not linear; it operates according to the following logic:

One Artifact: The maximum damage bonus increases from 20% to 22%; in Inner Flame mode, it increases from 35% to 38.5%.

Two Artifact: The maximum damage bonus increases from 20% to 24%; in Inner Flame mode, it increases from 35% to 42%.

Based on the current temperature from the 'Glare' conversion.
Lava Walker
Allows the user to walk on lava.
Fleeting
Allows it to be combined with an elytra, enabling gliding while retaining armor protection.
Champion of the Flames: Skyburst

Press %s while gliding to consume 5%% of the stored heat in your Emberheart. This grants a forward boost, extending your glide. Boosts recover upon landing. They have a short cooldown during flight, but a longer one when recharging from the ground.

The cooldown of the pulses varies depending on how many pulses have been consumed:

3 impulses consumed, %s
2 impulses consumed, %s
1 impulses consumed, %s
Champion of the Flames: Impact

Once enough Kinetic Force has been stored in the Emberheart, and the latter contains at least 50%% Temperature in this same heart, it allows you to propel yourself strongly if you are looking down while pressing %s.
Once the effect is triggered, the user becomes effectively immortal during the skill duration fly or acceleration, and for 1 second after impact.
Morning Star

It allows the user to store kinetic energy while flying downwards. Once sufficient kinetic energy has been reached with a fall of more than 150 blocks and 'Champion of the Flames: Impact' has been launched, the user becomes immortal until impact with the ground. Upon impact, a fiery shockwave is activated. It burns enemies within a 15-block radius, dealing 26.5 damage. If the user is in the 'Inner Flame' state, the area damage is increased by 25%.

The amount of energy stored with a drop is relative, that means that even if it is 150 Blocks, starting from negative layers directly converts the value of the negative layer into a portion of the total drop, that means that if you start at Y = -60, the skill will start from Y = 60, and not from Y = 0, allowing the skill to be useful in caves, upon impact, an Impact Frame will be launched, which will affect all entities that have observed the drop. fall and the one who has fallen
Champion of the Flames: Command

Press %s to consume 15%% of the heat stored in your Emberheart. Upon doing so, you will precast a skill that awaits a target. Once one is found, Ignis orbs will rise into the sky to strike it. The amount of orbs increases based on the enchantment Fire Aspect.
It also marks nearby enemies, granting them the 'Blazing Mark' status if any, but doing so will cause the cooldown to increase by 25%%.

Amount of orbs that will be generated: %s.

The orbs when launched will have an incorporeal body, that means that they will pass through until they enter the 'Impact state. The impact mode is reached once the orbs are close to the target entity, that means that the orbs pass through entities that are not the target, and only those that are close to it; the speed of movement of the orbs is dynamic and depends on the distance from the target as well as the time of incorporeal and impact.

Based on the number of orbs, each one will pounce with a small delay and will occupy a different position when over the user. If the entity dies, both orbs disappear. If the caster dies, the orbs will not disappear and will be launched towards the target until they are all consumed, or the target is killed.
Ignis Eyes
Grants clear vision through lava, both from the outside and while submerged.
Flaming Thorns
Burns attackers and reflects fire if they attempt to ignite you.
Igneous Retribution
Increases damage dealt to burning entities by 5%%. If the entity is also affected by 'Blazing Brand', it takes an additional 2.5%% damage. Both effects stack.
Emberheart
Increased heat gain per piece of armor: %s%%

The blade of this weapon is engulfed in flames; these flames resonate with the life force of its victims. Inflicting damage or eliminating entities increases the amount of heat contained within the Heart of Embers.

Initially, 10% of the damage dealt is converted into heat, increased to 20% if the target is on fire.

Each level of Fire Aspect increases this base heat gain by +15%, and each piece of Ignitium armor adds an additional +5%.

Environmental conditions reduce the base heat gain as follows:

Water exposure (soaking, swimming, or being in water): −25%

Frozen biome: −10%

Rain: −15%

If the user is in the Inner Flame state, these environmental penalties are reduced by 65%. All environmental modifiers stack when applicable.

If the resulting base multiplier is below 0, no heat is generated.

After all base modifiers are applied, Inner Flame reduces the resulting heat gain by an additional 35%.

Finally, all heat gained is reduced by 60%, producing the final heat value.
Reduction of heat gain due to the environment: -%s%%

Your inner fire, your will; those flames have manifested on the outside, enveloping the weapon, giving it even more strength than it ever had, in exchange for more power the final heat gain has dropped by 35%...
Glare
Increased damage per Ignitium Armor: %s%%

Increases damage based on the heat stored in the Heart of Embers up to a maximum of 20%. This limit can be broken and increased to 35% while in Inner Flame state. Additionally, each piece of Ignitium armor increases damage by 1.25%.
